title: Mannile Mannile Song Lyrics Mazhai
stanzas: <div>Mannile Mannile Song Lyrics Mazhai

Mannile mannile
vandhu udaiyudhu vaanam
mazhaiyile karaiyuthe
rendu manangalin thooram

kadhil kaetkum idi oasai
kadhal nenin pari baasha
mazhaiyai pola uravaadu
manadhil enna peraasai

neeril ezhudhum
kadhal azhiyum
malai neere ezhudhidum
kadhal azhiyaathe

I love you Shailajaa Shailajaa
oh shailu shailu
I love you Shailajaa Shailajaa
oh shailu shailu
Mannile Mannile

Poo sidharidum megam
pon vaanavil varaigiratho
yen nirangalinaal namakoru
maalai seigiratho..

vaan thaaragai ellaam
neer pookkalin thoranamo
vaan dhevathaigal
aasigal koorum atchathaiyo..

iththnai mazhaiyilum
indha naanam karaiyavillai
kanni naan nanaiyalaam
karpu nanaivathillai

adi manithanai vidavum
mazhaithuli peridhu
idhuvarai puriyavillai.

I love you Shailajaa Shailajaa
oh shailu shailu
I love you Shailajaa Shailajaa
oh shailu shailu

naan kadhalai solla
en vaaimozhi thunaiyillaiye
than vaarthaigalaal
mazhaithuli en manam solliyathe

mun koapura azhagai
un thaavani moodiyathe
un ragasiyathi mazhaithuli
ambalam aakkiyathe

mazhai vilum pozhuthellaam
ennai vandhu servaayaa?
kadhalai serppathe mazhaiyin
velaiyaa ?

aada malargalil mazhai vilum
vergalil veyil vilum
adhisayam arivaayaa ?

I love you Shailajaa Shailajaa
oh shailu shailu
I love you Shailajaa Shailajaa
oh shailu shailu

seo.title: Mannile Mannile Song Lyrics Mazhai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic moments.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Mazhai.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by SPB Charan and Sumangali.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

When was the song released?

The song was released on September 30, 2005.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Mazhai, the song Mannile Mannile serves as a heartfelt expression of love between the lead characters. The soothing melody and romantic lyrics evoke a sense of longing and connection, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments. With the enchanting voices of SPB Charan and Sumangali, the song beautifully conveys the emotions of love and desire. It resonates with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mannile Mannile is a beautifully crafted romantic duet that showcases the enchanting voices of SPB Charan and Sumangali. With the magical touch of Devi Sri Prasad as the music director, this song perfectly captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into the melodious world of Mannile Mannile and let its soothing vibes sweep you off your feet.
stanzaMeanings: In this world, the sky is pouring rain, and it is the distance between two hearts.
The sound that love asks for is like the rain, what is my desire in this heart that connects like love?
Love written in water will fade away, but love that is written in the rain should not fade away.
I love you Shailajaa Shailajaa oh shailu shailu I love you Shailajaa Shailajaa oh shailu shailu
Are the flowers blooming in the sky, will they come to us with colors, will they make a garland for us?
Will the stars in the sky be the curtains of the water flowers, will the heavenly beings sing their praises?
Even in this rain, I have no shame, I cannot hide my innocence.
This rain has not yet understood how to let go of a person.
I love you Shailajaa Shailajaa oh shailu shailu I love you Shailajaa Shailajaa oh shailu shailu
I have no words to express my love, my heart does not speak with the words of the rain.
Your beauty does not hide the secrets of your heart, it has not turned into a temple of rain.
Does the rain come to me at all times? Is love the work of the rain?
Is the wonder of flowers blooming in the rain and the sun understood?
I love you Shailajaa Shailajaa oh shailu shailu I love you Shailajaa Shailajaa oh shailu shailu
In this world, the sky is pouring rain, and it is the distance between two hearts.
The sound that love asks for is like the rain, what is my desire in this heart that connects like love?
Love written in water will fade away, but love that is written in the rain should not fade away.
